demographics.occupation: office-based professional (unable to work at present)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart won't stop racing, my joints are burning, and I jump at my own shadow. My partner made me call because I've been shaking and sweating and I can't calm down tonight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The racing heart and shaking got much worse tonight and I couldn't wait until morning — I feel like something is really wrong with my body.

symptom_narrative.onset: a low-level on-edge feeling for about six months, but the racing heart and shaking flared badly over the past week and are worst tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: six months of feeling wound up; one week of the racing heart; acute flare this evening
symptom_narrative.character: heart pounding and racing, hot burning aches all through my joints and muscles, jumping and startling at small noises, sweating in a cool room, shaking
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: tonight it feels the worst it's ever been — I can't settle at all and I feel wired and exhausted at the same time
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest/heart, and aching all over my joints and muscles
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: always worse at night; I wake at 3am every night and can't get back to sleep
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; my usual anxiety tablets haven't touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: stress, sudden noises, and lying awake at night thinking
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: foggy thinking, can't hold things in my memory, no interest or joy in things, wiped out and can't work
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt anxious and on-edge for months but never with my heart pounding like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't do my job at the moment because of the fog and the exhaustion

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I'm under constant stress and feel like I'm treated unfairly and worn down by it; my partner is here with me tonight and is worried.

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading from a consumer smartwatch during acute distress; not a clinician measurement
single reading on an uncalibrated home cuff during acute distress

objective_data_offered.value: partner reports the patient looks sweaty, restless and hypervigilant, is checking the door locks repeatedly, and startles at small sounds
